use_cases: Display feature highlights with interactive spotlight effects on hover
Create premium-feeling product showcase cards with mouse-tracking animations
Build engaging testimonial or profile cards with ambient glow effects
Design interactive pricing tier cards with attention-grabbing hover states
Implement container components with subtle visual feedback for user engagement
ai_summary: A spotlight card component with dark minimalist styling that creates a radial gradient effect following the mouse cursor on hover. Features smooth opacity transitions and focus/blur state handling for accessibility. The spotlight effect uses a configurable color with a 30% opacity threshold, creating an elegant ambient glow that draws attention to specific card elements.
